case_title: CHRISTINA MEJIA GARRUCHO VS. HORACIO ORTIZ SUAREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARK: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARRUCHO, CHRISTINA MEJIA AS TO DEFENDANT SUAREZ, HORACIO ORTIZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 25, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WITHOUT A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE, DEFENDANT PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE PROCESS, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-ORDER OF EXAMINATION OFF CALENDAR MAILED TO CHRISTINA GARRUCHO -RETURN TO SENDER/ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SUAREZ, HORACIO ORTIZ HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT OR UNCONTESTED JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY GARRUCHO, CHRISTINA MEJIA AS TO DEFENDANT SUAREZ, HORACIO ORTIZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARRUCHO, CHRISTINA MEJIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUAREZ, HORACIO ORTIZ $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED MAR-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SUAREZ, HORACIO ORTIZ
ORDER ORDER OF EXAMINATION OFF CALENDER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES.
